name: Thumbnail
description: Renders a bounded single-format thumbnail via image-extractor. Covers image-extractor's supported formats that file-type detects a real image/* MIME signature for — confirmed empirically for jpeg/png/webp/avif/tiff/gif via real sharp-encoded fixtures; heic/heif/psd are not independently verified in this environment (no real sample bytes available) but rely on their IANA-registered image/* MIME types, which file-type is built to recognise. See thumbnail-svg/renderer.json for the one exception in this extractor's own list: SVG, which file-type detects as generic application/xml rather than an image/* MIME — still binary_category "other" rather than "image", pairing with Raw binary the same as the rest of this list, just via a separate rung-1 file_type match rather than sharing this manifest's array (an application/xml-mimed file needs its own binary_category to stay accurate, even though the array match would have worked identically for matching purposes).
